zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mytton於1415年12月28日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德時，他的父親Richard Mytton26歲，母親Margaret Pershal22歲。他於大約1433年與Margaret Corbet在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年之後在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mytton于1415年12月28日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾韋斯頓 武安德 利札爾德时，他的父亲Richard Mytton26岁，母亲Margaret Pershal22岁。他于大约1433年与Margaret Corbet在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年之后在英国英格兰斯塔福爾，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mytton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mitton
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and the West Midlands, so named in Old English as ‘farmstead at a river confluence’, from (ge)m̄ȳthe ‘river confluence’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mytton was born on 28 December 1415, in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Mytton, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Pershal, was 22. He married Margaret Corbet about 1433, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died after 1489, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mytton est né le 28 décembre 1415, à Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Mytton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Pershal, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Corbet environ 1433, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé après 1489, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mytton am 28. Dezember 1415 in Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Mytton 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Pershal 22. Er hat um 1433 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb nach 1489 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Corbet circa 1433, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Myttonが1415年12月28日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストン ウンダー リザルドで生まれた時，父Richard Myttonは26歳，母Margaret Pershalは22歳であった。約1433年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年以後にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Mytton(이)가 1415년 12월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴 운더 리자르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Mytton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Pershal(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1433년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mytton nasceu em 28 de dezembro de 1415, em Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Mytton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Pershal, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Corbet aproximadamente 1433, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1489, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mytton родился 28 декабря 1415 г. в местности вестон ундир лизард, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Mytton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Pershal, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Corbet около 1433 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер после 1489 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mytton nació el 28 de diciembre de 1415, en Weston under Lizard, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Mytton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Pershal, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Corbet aproximadamente 1433, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 1489, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
